proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` increases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_041
analyses.result_summary: `feature_041` was the strongest univariate predictor. The slope was +0.176502 months per 1-unit increase in `feature_041` (SE 0.000662; t=266.53; n=50000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_025` values are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; moving from lower to higher `feature_025` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_025
analyses.result_summary: `feature_025` had a strong negative linear association with `pfs_months`; the slope was -1.189668 months per 1-level increase (SE 0.014164; t=-83.99). Mean PFS was 5.271 months at level 0, 4.054 at level 1, and 2.908 at level 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036=0`.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS / mean difference: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_036
analyses.result_summary: `feature_036=1` was associated with a -1.352001 month lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_036=0` (SE 0.019704; t=-68.61).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043=0`.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS / mean difference: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_043
analyses.result_summary: `feature_043=1` was associated with a +0.972162 month higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_043=0` (SE 0.025244; t=38.51).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_056` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_056` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_056
analyses.result_summary: `feature_056` was negatively associated with `pfs_months`, with a slope of -0.073015 months per 1-unit increase (SE 0.002638; t=-27.68).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_050` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_050` increases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_050
analyses.result_summary: `feature_050` was positively associated with `pfs_months`, with a slope of +0.465363 months per 1-unit increase (SE 0.020344; t=22.87).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS / mean difference: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_001
analyses.result_summary: `feature_001=1` was associated with a -0.326773 month lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_001=0` (SE 0.020740; t=-15.76).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015=0`.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS / mean difference: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_015
analyses.result_summary: `feature_015=1` was associated with a -0.305207 month lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_015=0` (SE 0.021412; t=-14.25).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_029` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_029` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.code: Univariate OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_029
analyses.result_summary: `feature_029` had a small but significant negative univariate association with `pfs_months`, slope -0.005346 months per 1-unit increase (SE 0.000633; t=-8.44).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066=1` have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066=0`, independent of `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, and `feature_029`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + feature_025 + feature_036 + feature_043 + feature_056 + feature_050 + feature_001 + feature_015 + feature_029 + feature_066 + feature_042
analyses.result_summary: After adjustment for the dominant main effects, `feature_066=1` remained associated with lower `pfs_months`; adjusted coefficient -0.355527 months (SE 0.018903; t=-18.81).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042=1` have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042=0`, independent of `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + feature_025 + feature_036 + feature_043 + feature_056 + feature_050 + feature_001 + feature_015 + feature_029 + feature_066 + feature_042
analyses.result_summary: `feature_042=1` had a positive univariate association, but after adjustment its coefficient was only +0.021021 months (SE 0.022895; t=0.92), so the independent main-effect hypothesis was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Compared with `feature_025=0`, `feature_025=1` and `feature_025=2` each have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`, with `feature_025=2` having the larger decrement.

analyses.code: Adjusted categorical OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + I(feature_025==1) + I(feature_025==2) + feature_036 + feature_043 + feature_056 + feature_050
analyses.result_summary: Treating `feature_025` categorically confirmed a graded decrement. Compared with `feature_025=0`, level 1 was -1.197490 months (SE 0.008813; p<1e-300) and level 2 was -2.336092 months (SE 0.012383; p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is nonlinear and becomes stronger at higher `feature_041` values, yielding a positive quadratic term.

analyses.code: Quadratic OLS: pfs_months ~ centered(feature_041) + centered(feature_041)^2
analyses.result_summary: The quadratic term for centered `feature_041` was positive and significant: +0.000589 months per squared unit (SE 0.000048; t=12.14).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_056` and `pfs_months` becomes increasingly negative at higher `feature_056` values, yielding a negative quadratic term.

analyses.code: Quadratic OLS: pfs_months ~ centered(feature_056) + centered(feature_056)^2
analyses.result_summary: The quadratic term for centered `feature_056` was negative but not significant: -0.000307 months per squared unit (SE 0.000576; t=-0.53), so the nonlinear-worsening hypothesis was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher `feature_025` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_025` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_041)*centered(feature_025)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted centered interaction `feature_041` x `feature_025` was negative: -0.007283 months per product unit (SE 0.000569; t=-12.80). Unadjusted slopes for `feature_041` were 0.1800, 0.1774, and 0.1631 within `feature_025` levels 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_036=1` than among patients with `feature_036=0`; the `feature_041` by `feature_036` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_041)*centered(feature_036)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction `feature_041` x `feature_036` was negative: -0.006901 months per product unit (SE 0.000780; t=-8.85). The unadjusted `feature_041` slope was 0.1804 when `feature_036=0` and 0.1733 when `feature_036=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is stronger at higher `feature_050` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_050` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_041)*centered(feature_050)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction `feature_041` x `feature_050` was positive: +0.003876 months per product unit (SE 0.000773; t=5.01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher `feature_056` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_056` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_041)*centered(feature_056)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction `feature_041` x `feature_056` was negative: -0.000456 months per product unit (SE 0.000100; t=-4.53).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `feature_001=1`; the `feature_001` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_001)*centered(feature_043)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_001` x `feature_043` interaction was strongly negative: -1.631056 months (SE 0.018130; t=-89.96). Unadjusted `feature_043=1` vs 0 differences were +1.6557 months when `feature_001=0` and +0.0269 months when `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `feature_015=1`; the `feature_015` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_015)*centered(feature_043)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_015` x `feature_043` interaction was negative: -1.461037 months (SE 0.019132; t=-76.37). Unadjusted `feature_043=1` vs 0 differences were +1.4796 months when `feature_015=0` and +0.0255 months when `feature_015=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_029` is more strongly associated with lower `pfs_months` among patients with `feature_043=1` than among patients with `feature_043=0`; the `feature_029` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_029)*centered(feature_043)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_029` x `feature_043` interaction was negative: -0.025801 months per product unit (SE 0.000592; t=-43.55). Unadjusted `feature_029` slopes were -0.00047 when `feature_043=0` and -0.02574 when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined negative association of `feature_001=1` and `feature_015=1` with `pfs_months` is less severe than the sum of their individual negative associations; the `feature_001` by `feature_015` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_001)*centered(feature_015)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_001` x `feature_015` interaction was positive: +0.511717 months (SE 0.016211; t=31.57). Unadjusted `feature_015=1` vs 0 differences were -0.4935 months when `feature_001=0` and -0.0418 months when `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_066=1` is associated with especially lower `pfs_months` among patients with `feature_043=1`; the `feature_066` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_066)*centered(feature_043)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_066` x `feature_043` interaction was negative: -0.989200 months (SE 0.045638; t=-21.67). Unadjusted `feature_066=1` vs 0 differences were +0.0098 months when `feature_043=0` and -1.1731 months when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_042=1` is associated with higher `pfs_months` primarily among patients with `feature_043=1`; the `feature_042` by `feature_043` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_042)*centered(feature_043)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_042` x `feature_043` interaction was positive: +0.888114 months (SE 0.055541; t=15.99). Unadjusted `feature_042=1` vs 0 differences were +0.0086 months when `feature_043=0` and +0.9966 months when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_036=1` and `pfs_months` is slightly less severe at higher `feature_025` values; the `feature_025` by `feature_036` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: Adjusted interaction OLS: pfs_months ~ selected main effects + centered(feature_025)*centered(feature_036)
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_025` x `feature_036` interaction was positive but modest: +0.044936 months per product unit (SE 0.011450; t=3.92). Unadjusted `feature_036=1` vs 0 differences were -1.4013, -1.3461, and -1.2701 months within `feature_025` levels 0, 1, and 2.
